question_intent: Average number of points scored by constructors in races where a British driver won

plan.question_intent: Average number of points scored by constructors in races where a British driver won
plan.detail_query: SELECT c.name AS constructor_name, r.year AS race_year, r.name AS race_name, cr.points AS constructor_points FROM constructors c JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid WHERE d.nationality = 'British' AND res.position = 1 GROUP BY c.name, r.year, r.name, cr.points HAVING cr.points > 0

steps.reason: where predicate made the probe empty

steps.sql:
SELECT c.name AS constructor_name, r.year AS race_year, r.name AS race_name, cr.points AS constructor_points
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'British')
GROUP BY c.name, r.year, r.name, cr.points
HAVING (cr.points > 0)

SELECT c.name AS constructor_name, r.year AS race_year, r.name AS race_name, cr.points AS constructor_points
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'British')
GROUP BY c.name, r.year, r.name, cr.points
HAVING (cr.points > 0)

build_logs.notes: Average points scored by constructors in races where a British driver won

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT c.name AS constructor_name, r.year AS race_year, r.name AS race_name, cr.points AS constructor_points
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'British')
GROUP BY c.name, r.year, r.name, cr.points
HAVING (cr.points > 0)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.constructor_points) AS avg_points
FROM (SELECT c.name AS constructor_name, r.year AS race_year, r.name AS race_name, cr.points AS constructor_points
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'British')
GROUP BY c.name, r.year, r.name, cr.points
HAVING (cr.points > 0)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(constructor_points) AS average_points
FROM (SELECT c.name AS constructor_name, r.year AS race_year, r.name AS race_name, cr.points AS constructor_points
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'Brazilian') AND (res.positionorder >= 1)) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average number of points scored by constructors in races where at least one British driver participated, considering only races where the constructor earned more than zero points?
